channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Federal judge halts Trump administration effort to subpoena Walz in immigration enforcement probe
item.description: A federal judge has blocked an attempt by the Trump administration to subpoena Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz and other state officials, calling it an effort to “harass and retaliate against them.”

item.title: Supreme Court reinstates murder conviction in case of Etan Patz, missing New York City boy
Family of 1-year-old killed by police at a Walmart in Mississippi wants video released
